items.titolo: OpenAI Should Stop Naming Its Creations After Products That Already Exist
items.descrizione: From “cameo” to “io,” OpenAI keeps trying to call its new and upcoming releases by names that resemble existing trademarks.

items.titolo: Agenti AI su Chrome, le misure di sicurezza di Google
items.descrizione: Gli agenti AI di Chrome sollevano rischi di sicurezza. Google spiega come proteggerà gli utenti con i modelli di controllo di Gemini. The post Agenti AI su Chrome, le misure di sicurezza di Google appeared first on…

items.titolo: Gemini vs. Copilot: I tested the AI tools on 7 everyday tasks, and it wasn't even close
items.descrizione: Microsoft is building Copilot into every product it owns, while Google is integrating its Gemini LLM tool into all of its properties. To determine which tool is better, I came up with seven challenges.

items.titolo: Research commissioned by OpenAI and Anthropic claims that workers are more efficient when using AI — Up to one hour saved on average, as companies make bid to maintain enterprise AI spending
items.descrizione: OpenAI and Anthropic claim in a pair of reports released today and earlier in the month that the use of enterprise AI tools increase productivity and corporate ROI. These studies may be damage control to counter those…
